reasoning: Addressing lactate clearance is crucial to reduce the 25W drop from 5-min to 20-min efforts. Your last ride showed a solid endurance base, but we need to focus on improving your aerobic base and fatigue resistance specifically for efforts like those on the Alpine Loop. This workout will structure efforts around the demands of the main climb.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3 x 10 min over-unders (3 min @ 256W, 3 min @ 218W, 4 min @ 242W) with 5 min easy spin between sets

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
